/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/nvcs-server.dir/server/main.cpp.o" -o nvcs-server  libnvcs_server.a libnvcs_core.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.1/lib/libcrypto.dylib /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd /Users/allexander/Desktop/nvcs/vcs/rust/version_system/target/release/libversion_system.a
